metadata.name: Perform Variance Analysis for Management Reporting

description: A financial analyst needs to investigate a significant variance in the 'Travel Expense' account on the income statement.

nodes.task_description: Identify that the Travel Expense account has a 50% unfavorable variance against budget.

expected_outcome.value: Agent flags the significant variance from the income statement.

nodes.task_description: Drill down into the general ledger detail for the Travel Expense account for the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves all transactions posted to the account.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the transactions to identify the root cause of the overspend.

expected_outcome.value: Agent discovers that the entire sales team attended an unscheduled conference, causing the variance.

nodes.task_description: Write a concise explanation of the variance to be included in the monthly management report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts a clear explanation for the variance.
